  1. uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool
  2. ToolPermission

Uses of Enum Class
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.ToolPermission

Packages that use ToolPermission
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi
The root package of the Anahata AI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool
Provides the core framework for defining, managing, and executing local Java tools.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi
Defines the model-agnostic domain model for the tool (function) calling subsystem.
uno.anahata.asi.swing
Provides the foundational Swing UI components for managing and switching between multiple AI agi sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi
Provides the core UI orchestration components for individual AGI sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.context
Provides components and hierarchical models for the ASI Context Explorer.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.tool
Provides UI components for rendering tool-related message parts.

  • Uses of ToolPermission in uno.anahata.asi

    Fields in uno.anahata.asi with type parameters of type ToolPermission
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private Map<String, ToolPermission>
    AsiContainerPreferences.toolPermissions
    A map where the key is the tool name (e.g., "LocalFiles.readFile") and the value is the user's stored preference for that tool.

  • Uses of ToolPermission in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool

    Subclasses with type arguments of type ToolPermission in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    enum 
    ToolPermission
    Represents the user's interactive, one-time choice for a specific tool invocation within the UI prompt.
    Methods in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool that return ToolPermission
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static ToolPermission
    ToolPermission.valueOf(String name)
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    static ToolPermission[]
    ToolPermission.values()
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected ToolPermission
    AbstractTool.permission
    The user's configured preference for this tool, determining its execution behavior.
    Methods in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi with parameters of type ToolPermission
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    AbstractTool.setPermission(ToolPermission permission)
    Sets the user's execution permission preference for this tool and fires a property change event.
